_comment: Optional Claude Code Stop hook fragment. Warn-only: validates narrative Arc/register conformance through the installed Anarchy-AI user-profile runtime and exits 0 even when findings exist.

hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$exe = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.codex\plugins\anarchy-ai\runtime\win-x64\AnarchyAi.Mcp.Server.exe'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $exe) { & $exe --validate-narrative-arc --workspace-root (Get-Location).Path --json; exit 0 }; Write-Output 'Anarchy-AI narrative Arc validator unavailable; install or refresh the user-profile harness to enable checkpoint validation.'; exit 0"
